assertions.title: Timer is reachable via real shell navigation
assertions.reason: Blocked before browser validation because the assigned frontend runtime on http://127.0.0.1:5173 was unreachable on repeated readiness checks.

steps.expected: Positive HTTP reachability so browser validation can start
steps.observed: curl returned connection refused and agent-browser open failed with net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED

steps.expected: Backend reachable for the same local runtime
steps.observed: Backend responded HTTP 404 at root, indicating the process was listening

evidence.consoleErrors: not collected; frontend never became reachable
evidence.network: Readiness checks only: GET/HEAD http://127.0.0.1:5173/ -> connection refused; GET/HEAD http://127.0.0.1:8080/ -> HTTP 404

assertions.issues: Frontend runtime unavailable, so shell login/navigation and /timer document loading could not be exercised.

assertions.title: Direct entry and shell entry converge on the same timer state
assertions.reason: Blocked because the assigned frontend runtime on http://127.0.0.1:5173 was unreachable, preventing both shell and direct /timer entry validation under a real browser session.

steps.expected: Frontend available for both shell and direct entry paths
steps.observed: Repeated connection refused from curl and Playwright/agent-browser

steps.action: Attempt browser open against frontend URL
steps.expected: Application loads so authenticated session setup and timer comparisons can proceed

evidence.network: Readiness checks only: frontend unavailable at 5173; backend listening at 8080 root with HTTP 404

assertions.issues: Could not compare shell entry vs direct /timer entry because no browser-visible frontend surface was available.

blockers.description: Assigned frontend runtime on port 5173 was down or unreachable throughout validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried HTTP readiness after delay, verified backend separately, attempted agent-browser open, and then closed the browser session.

summary: Both assigned assertions are blocked because the browser frontend at http://127.0.0.1:5173 was not reachable, while the backend at http://127.0.0.1:8080 was listening. No user-surface timer flow evidence could be captured.
